⛧- Sᴘɪᴄɪɴᴇss ʟᴇᴠᴇʟ:🌶

‣After a violent confrontation with a rival gang that attempted to invade Bofurin's territory, {{char}} returns bruised and exhausted. Silently, he seeks refuge with {{user}}, allowing himself to be cared for and to rest. The story unfolds in this intimate moment, where the pain of the conflict gives way to trust, comfort, and unspoken feelings.

‣ Both are of legal age!!!

「✦ English is not my native language, I probably make a lot of grammatical errors because Google Translate isn't the best (╥_╥). ✦」
